name: harness_s01
prompt:
OVERVIEW
A 16:9 illustrated PPT cover slide introducing the topic of Claude Code Harness design philosophy and open-source references. The title is the dominant visual anchor; one chibi character stands beside it as a mentor guide.

STYLE
Soft-watercolor children's-storybook illustration, super-deformed 2.5-head-body chibi characters with large round shiny eyes, small pink blush circles, tiny mouths, pastel palette, gentle rounded outlines, hand-painted brush feel.

CHARACTER
On the right side: a chibi teenage scientist girl with dark-brown near-black hair in twin tails with purple gradient tips, gold forehead hair clip, red-amber eyes, white lab coat over pink dress with brown belt, pointing firmly at the title with a small wooden pointer stick, confident mentor smile, pink blush circles on cheeks, super-deformed 2.5-head-body chibi proportions.

LAYOUT
The slide has one dominant element: a large bold title at the upper third, one hero illustration filling the middle (a softly glowing watercolor terminal window with gentle code lines flowing out of it, surrounded by small floating gears and a tiny shield), and a single subtitle line at the bottom. Generous whitespace.

TEXT CONTENT (every Chinese string below must render exactly as written, in a bold handwritten font similar to LXGW WenKai, dark warm brown for titles, darker gray for subtitle):
- Top center title (large, bold): "Claude Code Harness"
- Subtitle bottom (smaller, gray): "设计思想与开源参考"

DECORATIVE ELEMENTS
Three small hand-painted watercolor motifs: a tiny terminal window with curly braces, a small gear, a small shield with a checkmark painted as a brush stroke.

BACKGROUND
Warm cream-yellow (#FFF6E4) base with very subtle gradient and faint paper-grain texture. No magical forest, no petal swarms.

name: harness_s02
prompt:
OVERVIEW
A 16:9 illustrated PPT slide with two chibi characters in conversation about what an Agentic Harness is. Dialogue bubbles are the main visual.

STYLE
Soft-watercolor children's-storybook illustration, super-deformed 2.5-head-body chibi characters with large round shiny eyes, small pink blush circles, tiny mouths, pastel palette, gentle rounded outlines, hand-painted brush feel.

CHARACTERS
Left side: a tiny chibi girl with very long silver-grey hair with pink gradient tips reaching her waist, one large springy ahoge curl on top, amber-orange eyes, oversized light-blue T-shirt with red label, grey sweatpants, barefoot, confused head-tilt with a small painted question-mark bubble above her head.
Right side: a chibi teenage scientist girl with dark-brown hair in twin tails with purple tips, gold hair clip, red-amber eyes, white lab coat over pink dress, pointing upward with one finger, confident smile.

LAYOUT
A small unobtrusive title at the top. Two characters face each other across the middle, each with a large hand-drawn speech bubble. Left bubble is peach-pink, right bubble is mint-green. Bubbles are the dominant visual.

TEXT CONTENT (every Chinese string must render exactly as written, in bold handwritten font similar to LXGW WenKai, dark warm brown):
- Top title (small): "什么是 Harness"
- Left bubble: "Harness 和普通 CLI 有什么区别？"
- Right bubble: "它是把 LLM 变成编码 Agent 的执行环境"

DECORATIVE ELEMENTS
Two small motifs: a tiny painted gear near the right bubble, a small terminal prompt symbol near the left bubble.

BACKGROUND
Warm cream-yellow (#FFF6E4) base with very subtle gradient and faint paper-grain texture.

name: harness_s03
prompt:

CHARACTERS
Far left: a chibi girl with light caramel-brown short fluffy twin tails, green eyes, navy blazer with pink trim, hand raised asking a question, curious expression.
Far right: a chibi girl with short dark-brown bob hair, blue ribbon on the side, red-pink eyes, navy suspender dress over white blouse, arms crossed confidently, calm expression.

LAYOUT
Title at top. A horizontal flow runs left to right with four nodes connected by hand-drawn arrow strokes. Each node is a small watercolor rounded rectangle with a label inside. Characters anchor the start and end.

TEXT CONTENT (every Chinese string must render exactly as written, in bold handwritten font similar to LXGW WenKai, dark warm brown):

- Node 2 label: "Harness 执行框架"

None extra. The four-node flow with arrows IS the visual richness.

Warm cream-yellow (#FFF6E4) base with very subtle gradient and faint paper-grain texture.
